underlying_goal: Set up and configure Dolt and Beads (bd) as a permanent, reliable infrastructure in the user's system, including understanding Dolt deeply, connecting it to beads, configuring remotes, and adding bootstrap scripts for persistence
friction_detail: Claude tried to set up a filesystem remote and switch ports while the user was independently updating Dolt and had a different port/server configuration in mind, causing a brief interruption and correction.
brief_summary: User wanted to get Dolt and Beads set up permanently with bootstrap scripts and understand Dolt deeply; Claude researched Dolt, mapped the infrastructure, configured remotes, and drafted a bootstrap plan but the session ended before full implementation.
